*gun.linePrev: Ayo so let me explain how this is gonna work
*gun.line: When you hear this sound *Gun cocks*
*gun.lineNext: That means I'm about to go in off the top of my head
stanza: This right here is a vocal exercise
Verses and freestyles, three to one, that's a ratio
Ayo so let me explain how this is gonna work
When you hear this sound *Gun cocks*
That means I'm about to go in off the top of my head
Everything else is pre written, these verses are all wordplay
The tone and the emotions of the lyrics change
They progress in the same way as the album does
Think of all these verses as the cracks between the songs
It's extra, I want to recap what's been going on and start to hint for what's t…
This is where I, elaborate on what I mean
You know, this'll, this'll help explain my ideology
There's knowledge hidden in here that's gonna make the album click together
No Backups, no editing, it's just gonna be one vocal track ya know?
I'm gonna keep it nice and simple, simple beat
And I'm a real emcee so I don't need a crazy beat to flex
I just let my lyrics do the talking, so uh, how long did I make this beat?
